---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem
What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the behavior you want.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you considered.

## Scope impact
- Is this MVP-critical?
- Does it affect config format?
- Does it require backend-specific support (GNOME/KDE/Sway)?

## Acceptance criteria
Clear checklist for done state.

## Additional context
Links, mockups, examples.
